name: Dataforsyningen
dataType: topographic maps, cadastral parcels, orthophotos, DEM, addresses, administrative boundaries
description: Denmark's central geospatial data portal providing basemaps, elevation models, buildings, roads, cadastral data and orthophotos via web services and download.

name: DMI Open Data
dataType: weather observations, climate data, forecasts, radar, lightning
description: Open weather observations, quality-controlled climate data and HARMONIE forecasts from DMI stations across Denmark, Greenland and the Faroe Islands.

name: GEUS Data and Maps
operator: Geological Survey of Denmark and Greenland (GEUS)
dataType: geological maps, borehole data, geophysical surveys, groundwater, mineral resources
description: Geological knowledge and data from GEUS covering groundwater (Jupiter database), minerals, energy and climate for Denmark and Greenland.

name: Danmarks Miljøportal
operator: Danmarks Miljøportal (State, Municipalities and Regions partnership)
dataType: species observations, nature areas, water quality, soil contamination, land use regulations
description: Denmark's environmental data portal with 11.5 million species observations, 100+ datasets on nature, water, soil contamination and land use for environmental governance.

name: Open Data DK
dataType: multi-domain open datasets including transport, environment, demographics, economy
description: Danish open data portal aggregating public datasets from municipalities and government agencies across multiple domains.

name: Landmælingar Íslands Geoportal
operator: Landmælingar Íslands (National Land Survey of Iceland)
dataType: topographic maps, cadastral data, orthophotos, DEM, place names, administrative boundaries
description: Iceland's national geoportal providing topographic, cadastral and elevation data through GeoNetwork-based metadata catalogue and OGC web services.

name: Icelandic Meteorological Office (Veðurstofa Íslands)
dataType: weather observations, climate data, seismic monitoring, volcanic monitoring, hydrology
description: Meteorological, seismic and hydrological observations from the Icelandic Meteorological Office, including volcanic monitoring and climate time series since 1961.

name: Náttúrufræðistofnun Íslands (Natural History Institute)
dataType: geological maps, bedrock maps, surficial deposits, plant communities, habitat types, species distributions
description: Geological maps, habitat type data, species distributions and natural science datasets from Iceland's Natural History Institute.

name: Orkustofnun (National Energy Authority)
dataType: geothermal resource data, borehole registers, energy statistics, geothermal maps
description: Geothermal resource data, borehole registers and energy statistics from Iceland's National Energy Authority managing utilisation of geothermal and hydropower resources.

name: Iceland SDI Portal (Kort.gis.is)
dataType: multi-layer spatial data viewer with cadastral, topographic, infrastructure, and environmental layers
description: Iceland's National Spatial Data Infrastructure portal providing an integrated map viewer combining data from multiple government agencies.

name: Estonian Land Board Geoportal
operator: Maa-amet (Estonian Land and Spatial Development Board)
dataType: cadastral data, topographic database, orthophotos, LiDAR, DEM, address data, administrative boundaries
description: Estonia's central geoportal with open cadastral data, topographic database, LiDAR point clouds at 1 m resolution, orthophotos and administrative boundaries.

name: Estonian Weather Service (Ilmateenistus)
dataType: weather observations, climate data, forecasts, radar, marine weather
description: Meteorological observations, quality-controlled climate data and weather radar from the Estonian Weather Service stations across Estonia.

name: Estonian Environmental Portal (Keskkonnaportaal)
dataType: environmental monitoring, water quality, air quality, biodiversity, remote sensing, weather radar
description: Estonia's environmental data portal providing open access to monitoring data on water, air, biodiversity and remote sensing through the KAIA open data repository.

name: Estonian Geological Survey Data
dataType: LiDAR point clouds, DTM, DSM, canopy height model
spatialResolution: 1 m, 5 m, 10 m, 25 m grids; raw LAZ 1 km2 tiles
description: Complete national LiDAR coverage of Estonia with DTM, DSM and canopy height models at multiple resolutions, freely downloadable without registration.

name: Latvian Geospatial Information Agency (LGIA)
dataType: topographic maps, orthophotos, DEM, geodetic data, administrative boundaries
description: Latvia's national mapping agency providing topographic maps, orthophotos, elevation models and geodetic reference data.

name: Latvia State Land Service Cadastre (Kadastrs.lv)
dataType: cadastral parcels, property boundaries, land use, property valuations
description: Latvia's official cadastral information system covering 100% of national territory with digital textual and spatial data on all immovable properties.

name: LEGMC - Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre
operator: Latvijas Vides, ģeoloģijas un meteoroloģijas centrs (LEGMC)
dataType: weather observations, climate data, hydrological data, air quality, geological data
description: Latvia's combined environment, geology and meteorology centre providing weather, hydrology, air quality, climate and geological data for national monitoring.

name: Latvian Open Data Portal
operator: Ministry of Environmental Protection and Regional Development
dataType: multi-domain datasets including environment, transport, economy, education, health
description: Latvia's national open data portal aggregating over 900 datasets from 100+ publishers across environment, transport, education and other domains.

name: GeoLatvija Geoportal
dataType: multi-layer spatial data: cadastral, topographic, environmental, infrastructure
description: Latvia's national spatial data infrastructure portal providing a single access point to geospatial information from multiple data holders.

name: Lithuanian Spatial Information Portal (Geoportal.lt)
dataType: cadastral parcels, topographic maps, orthophotos, addresses, buildings, administrative boundaries
description: Lithuania's national spatial data portal managed by GIS-Centras with cadastral data for 1.9 million parcels, INSPIRE-compliant datasets and OGC services.

name: Registrų centras - Real Property Cadastre
dataType: real property cadastre, property register, address register, legal entities register
description: Lithuania's integrated real property cadastre and register system with unified database of cadastral and legal data for all properties.

name: Lithuanian Hydrometeorological Service (Meteo.lt)
dataType: weather observations, forecasts, climate data, hydrological observations, water levels
description: Weather observations, 7-day forecasts and hydrological data from 18 meteorological and 95 water measurement stations via the Meteo.lt open API.

name: Lithuanian Environmental Protection Agency
dataType: air quality, water quality, waste management, environmental monitoring, climate change indicators
description: Environmental monitoring data from Lithuania's EPA covering air pollution, water quality, waste and climate change indicators.

name: GIS-Centras National Georeference Base
operator: VĮ Distancinių tyrimų ir geoinformatikos centras (GIS-Centras)
dataType: georeference base cadastre, orthophotos, LiDAR, topographic data
description: Lithuania's national centre for remote sensing and geoinformatics managing the georeference base cadastre, orthophoto production and national LiDAR programme.

name: National Land Survey of Finland Open Data
dataType: topographic maps, cadastral data, orthophotos, DEM, LiDAR, place names
description: Finland's national mapping agency open data including topographic database, cadastral boundaries, LiDAR elevation data and orthophotos under CC BY 4.0 license.

name: Paikkatietoikkuna - Finnish Geodata Portal
dataType: aggregated spatial data from 70+ organisations, 3000+ map layers
description: Finland's national INSPIRE geoportal aggregating 3000+ map layers from 70 organisations into a unified viewer built on open-source Oskari platform.

name: FMI Open Data (Finnish Meteorological Institute)
dataType: weather observations, forecasts, climate time series, radar, lightning, air quality, sea observations
description: Comprehensive open weather, climate, sea and air quality data from FMI via OGC WFS/WMS interfaces under CC BY 4.0 license.

name: GTK Hakku - Geological Data Service
operator: Geologian tutkimuskeskus (Geological Survey of Finland - GTK)
dataType: geological maps, mineral resources, geochemistry, geophysics, drill core data, 3D models
description: Gateway to Finland's geological data with 17,000+ downloadable products including geological maps from 1850, geophysical surveys, mineral data and 3D models.

name: SYKE Open Data (Finnish Environment Institute)
dataType: water resources, land cover (CORINE), Baltic Sea data, environmental load, nature conservation areas
description: Open environmental data from SYKE on water resources, land cover, Baltic Sea conditions, biodiversity and environmental loading for Finland.

name: SYKE Hydrological Data Service
dataType: lake and river water levels, discharge, water temperature, ice cover, water quality
description: Hydrological monitoring data from SYKE including water levels, discharge, temperature and ice cover for Finland's lakes and rivers via open APIs.

name: Lantmäteriet Open Geodata
operator: Lantmäteriet (Swedish Mapping, Cadastral and Land Registration Authority)
dataType: topographic maps, cadastral data, orthophotos, DEM, administrative boundaries, place names
description: Sweden's open geodata portal from Lantmäteriet with free topographic, cadastral, elevation and administrative datasets under CC0 license via OGC API.

name: SMHI Open Data
dataType: weather observations, forecasts, hydrological data, oceanographic data, air quality, climate projections
description: Comprehensive open meteorological, hydrological, oceanographic and air quality data from SMHI covering Sweden via well-documented REST APIs.

name: SGU Geological Data (Geological Survey of Sweden)
dataType: bedrock maps, soil maps, groundwater, mineral resources, geophysics, marine geology
description: Open geological data from SGU including bedrock, quaternary deposits, groundwater, mineral resources and geophysical surveys for Sweden.

name: Naturvårdsverket Environmental Data
dataType: protected areas, species data, environmental monitoring, emissions, waste statistics
description: Environmental data from Sweden's EPA including protected natural areas, species observations, emission inventories and environmental monitoring results.

name: Miljödata MVM - Environmental Monitoring Data
dataType: water chemistry, aquatic biology, soil data, agricultural monitoring, pesticides
description: Sweden's national water and soil monitoring data portal with chemistry and biology data from lakes, watercourses and agricultural land collected through environmental monitoring programmes.

name: SCB Open Geodata (Statistics Sweden)
dataType: population grids, demographic statistics, DeSO areas, RegSO areas
description: Open statistical geodata from Statistics Sweden including population grids, demographic areas (DeSO/RegSO) and geographic statistical units.

name: Geonorge - Norwegian Geoportal
dataType: topographic data, property boundaries, addresses, elevation models, place names, roads
license: NLOD (Norwegian Licence for Open Government Data)
description: Norway's national geoportal providing open topographic data (N50-N5000), property boundaries, addresses, elevation models and place names from Kartverket.

name: Høydedata - Norwegian National Elevation Data
dataType: LiDAR point clouds, DTM, DSM at 1 m and 10 m resolution
description: Norway's national detailed elevation model programme providing free 1 m LiDAR-derived DTM/DSM covering expanding areas of the country.

name: MET Norway Weather API
dataType: weather observations, forecasts, climate data, radar, ocean forecasts, UV index
description: Free and open weather data from MET Norway including location forecasts, observations, radar, climate normals and ocean data via well-documented REST APIs.

name: NVE Hydrological Data (Norwegian Water Resources and Energy Directorate)
dataType: streamflow, water level, snow, glaciers, groundwater, flood maps, catchment data
description: Hydrological data from NVE's Hydra II database covering streamflow, groundwater, snow, glaciers and flood mapping for Norway, accessible via the VEPS API.

name: NGU Geological Data (Geological Survey of Norway)
dataType: bedrock maps, quaternary geology, geochemistry, mineral resources, geophysics, marine geology
description: Freely available geological data from NGU including bedrock, quaternary deposits, geochemistry, minerals and marine geology distributed via Geonorge.

name: Norwegian Environment Agency Map Catalog
dataType: nature types, protected areas, species data, pollution, climate emissions, noise mapping
description: Environmental map services from Norway's Environment Agency covering nature types, protected areas, pollution data and greenhouse gas emissions.

name: MET Norway Data Portal
dataType: gridded climate datasets, reanalysis, satellite products, climate projections
description: Free and open environment and climate data from MET Norway including gridded datasets, reanalysis products and climate projections via THREDDS and REST.
